How ordering works

Browse freely. Pricing and online ordering unlock with an approved account, so your rates stay yours.

1

Request an account

Tell us about your operation: restaurant, camp, institution, or franchise. We approve accounts within one business day.

2

See your pricing

Sign in and every product shows your rate. Franchise and key accounts see their contract pricing, protected behind their own login.

3

Order online, your way

Check out by card, or approved accounts can order against a monthly invoice with no card fees. Live stock from our Barrie warehouse.

$150Minimum online order
2:00 pmSame-week delivery cutoff
Tue & ThuSimcoe County delivery days
FlaggedSpecial-handling items quoted first

A private portal for franchise & key accounts

Your negotiated pricing, your order flow, invisible to everyone else. Orders roll up to a single monthly invoice, so there are no per-transaction card fees eating the margin on either side.

  • Contract pricing locked to your account, never public
  • Monthly invoice billing instead of card checkout
  • Standing order lists for reorders in two clicks
  • Order history and receivables in one place
Talk to us about key-account access

Family owned since 1982

Two generations of outfitting Simcoe County's kitchens

Barrie Equipment Sales was started by the Boem family in 1982 and is still run by the family today. For 44 years, restaurants, summer camps, and institutions across the region have called the same phone number and dealt with people who know their kitchen by name.

The way you order is getting easier. The way we treat you isn't changing.
